summary: The diff implements most of the required changes: removing login/logout UI from Navigation (REQ-1), removing auth guards from admin pages (REQ-2), and partially addressing backend changes (REQ-4). However, the backend diff still shows authorization checks in admin functions, and REQ-3 (anonymous actor in useQueries.ts) cannot be fully confirmed from the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove caller-based authorization checks from all admin backend functions so anonymous principals are permitted
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff still shows explicit authorization checks using AccessControl.hasPermission with #admin guard in createPost: 'if (not (AccessControl.hasPermission(accessControlState, caller, #admin))) { Runtime.trap("Unauthorized: Only admins can create posts") }'. These checks were not removed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update all React Query hooks and mutations in useQueries.ts to use an anonymous actor instead of authenticated actor for admin operations
missing_requirements.reason: The actual useQueries.ts file content is not shown in the diff. The frontend-file-summaries.txt only mentions 'full CRUD hooks for posts' without confirming anonymous actor usage. Cannot verify that mutations switched from authenticated to anonymous actor.
